3165710.name: Wild West Panic
3165710.description:
Immerse yourself in the shoes of a famous Far West cowboy. No one is around, only wooden targets appear everywhere. It’s up to you to shoot faster than your shadow!

Warning :this Game Is Virtual Reality Only


Wild West Panic is a hyper-casual game designed to introduce you to virtual reality. Explore the 7 levels and try to beat your high score !

Main Gameplay Elements

  • Environment & Level : Experience seven closed environments that you can replay endlessly to beat your high score!
  • Gameplay : Jump straight into the action, no tutorial required.
  • Game physics : Enjoy partially destructible environments where you can practice and refine your shooting skills.
  • Weapons : Choose between one or two rifles for extra fun.
  • Enemies : Face off against wooden target dummies that represent your enemies, turning the game into a true shooting range experience!
  • Bosses : Encounter surprising and entertaining bosses that vary depending on the level.
  • Scoring : Your score depends on both the number of targets you hit and your shooting accuracy, missing a target may cause you to lose bonus points.
  • Replayability : Play again to improve your score and try out different strategies!
